wordplay_note: Jack's wife who has an affair with Arnie Kott
card_description: Silvia Bohlen is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Martian Time-Slip*. Jack Bohlen's dissatisfied wife on the Martian frontier. Name note: Jack's wife who has an affair with Arnie Kott. Suburban discontent transplanted to an alien world. First appears in *Martian Time-Slip*.

reference.brief: Jack Bohlen's dissatisfied wife on the Martian frontier
reference.significance: Suburban discontent transplanted to an alien world
